title: Luscious Molten Peruvian Cashew Picarones
description: Tangy and molten Peruvian dish featuring cashews, ferment jang, and gluten free friendly ingredients, formed into picarones.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine the mashed sweet potato, chopped cashews, ferment jang, coconut sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and cinnamon in a large bowl and mix well.
Gradually add the gluten free flour to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and make a hole in the center to form a picarone.
Place the picarones on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the picarones from the oven and let them cool for 2 minutes before serving.
